About Us

Leading Electrical
Contractors in Kerala

Power Grid Electrical Engineering and Contractors was established in 1999 and has since grown progressively into a leading electrical contracting and consulting company with office in Manjeri, Malappuram.

We execute projects with long-term relationships with our clients in mind, and have earned a reputation for perfection, quality, promptness, reliability, experience and safety across Kerala's industrial, commercial, healthcare, and educational sectors.

Mission: Deliver quality electrical solutions with reliability, safety, and technical excellence.
Vision: Become Kerala's most trusted electrical engineering and contracting company.

Quality Workmanship
Safety First
Reliability
Timely Delivery
Client Satisfaction
Pan India Operations
What We Do

Our Services

⚡

Electrical Contracting

Our contracting team offers a wide range of HT & LT services from single line diagram preparation through to full commissioning.

  • HT & LT Contracting
  • Single Line Diagram Preparation
  • Substation Construction
  • DG Set Installation & Commissioning
  • HT & LT Switchgear Installation
  • Internal & External Electrification
🔧

Electrical Consulting

End-to-end consulting from project conceptualization through to commissioning support across the full project life cycle.

  • Project Conceptualization & Design
  • Electrical Estimation & Engineering
  • BOQ Preparation
  • Quantity Scheduling
  • Project Supervision
  • Certification of Works & Commissioning Support
Technical Proficiency

Proficient Areas

Our engineers are proficient across the full spectrum of electrical systems — from high-voltage substations and industrial panels to cable laying, earthing and AMC services.

  • Unitised Substations
  • Transformers
  • DG Sets
  • PCC Panels
  • MCC Panels
  • APFC Panels
  • AMF Panels
  • AC Drive Panels
  • Generator Control Panels
  • LT Panels
  • Synchronizing Panels
  • Capacitor Panels
  • Changeover Panels
  • Bus Duct Systems
  • Earthing Systems
  • Lightning Protection Systems
  • Light Wiring
  • Power Wiring
  • Cable Laying
  • Cable Tray Works
  • Yard Lighting
  • AMC Services

Why Choose Us

Our Core Strengths

🏆

25+ Years Experience

Established in 1999, we bring over two decades of expertise in electrical contracting and consulting across Kerala.

👷

Expert Engineering Team

Certified electrical engineers and skilled technicians delivering precision and professionalism on every project.

✅

Quality Workmanship

Committed to delivering the highest quality electrical work with meticulous attention to detail and industry standards.

🛡️

Safety Compliance

All works executed in strict compliance with Kerala State Electricity Board norms and national safety standards.

⏱️

Timely Project Delivery

Known for prompt execution and on-time project completion, minimizing disruption for our clients.

🌏

Pan India Project Execution

Active across Kerala and beyond — we have executed projects across India wherever our clients' needs take us.
